transcript: city's Xinfu district. They excavated sites from the Longshan period, 2900-2100 BC, the Warring States period, 475-221 BC, and 66 tombs from different dynasties. During the excavations, they discovered a well-preserved brick chamber tomb from the Ming dynasty on the west terrace of Hexata village in Xinfu district. The tomb's main chamber had two niches.
